name: Diff

unions.name: Change
unions.comment: This describes how each line has changed and also contains its value.

values.name: diff
values.comment:
Compares general lists.

    diff [ 1, 3 ] [ 2, 3 ]
    --> [ Removed 1, Added 2, NoChange 3 ]

This will never produce `Similar`, so you can use `never` in that branch.

    diff a b
        |> List.map
            (\change ->
                case change of
                    Diff.Added _ ->
                        1

                    Diff.Removed _ ->
                        -1

                    Diff.NoChange _ ->
                        0

                    Diff.Similar _ _ ever ->
                        never ever
            )
values.type: List.List a -> List.List a -> List.List (Diff.Change Basics.Never a)

values.name: diffLines
values.comment:
Compares two text. Considers two lines similar if they are equivalent ignoring spaces.

Giving the following text

    a =
        """aaa
    bbb
    ddd"""

    b =
        """zzz
    aaa
    ccc
    ddd"""

results in

    [ Added "zzz"
    , NoChange "aaa"
    , Removed "bbb"
    , Added "ccc"
    , NoChange "ddd"
    ]

.

values.name: diffLinesWith
values.comment: Calculate the diff between two multiline strings.
values.type: Diff.DiffOptions -> String.String -> String.String -> List.List (Diff.Change (List.List (Diff.Change Basics.Never Char.Char)) String.String)

values.name: diffWith
values.comment:
Compares general lists. Allows specifying when two elements are similar.

    diff (\l r -> if abs (l - r) < 1 then Just () else Nothing) [ 1, 3 ] [ 2, 3 ]
    --> [ Similar 1 2 (), NoChange 3 ]
values.type: (a -> a -> Maybe.Maybe similar) -> List.List a -> List.List a -> List.List (Diff.Change similar a)

values.name: equalIf
values.comment:
Configure when to consider two lines equal.

As an example you can use `\l r -> String.trim l == String.trim r` to ignore whitespace around lines.

values.name: ignoreLeadingWhitespace
values.comment:
Ignore leading whitespace when comparing multiline strings.

    diffLinesWith (defaultOptions |> ignoreLeadingWhitespace) "a" "  a"
    --> [ NoChange "a" ]

Equivalent to `equalIf (\a b -> String.trimLeft a == String.trimLeft b)`.

values.name: similarIf
values.comment: Configure when to consider two lines similar.

name: Diff.ToString
comment:
Convert a diff to a string representation.

@docs diffToString

values.name: diffToString
values.comment:
Converts a diff between strings into a pretty-printed, optionally colored, formatted diff.

`context` is the number of lines of context to show in the diff.
values.type: { context : Basics.Int, color : Basics.Bool } -> List.List (Diff.Change (List.List (Diff.Change Basics.Never Char.Char)) String.String) -> String.String
